summary: Comprehensive testing of FinTres Pro (renamed from FinTrack Pro) completed. All backend SMTP endpoints working correctly. Frontend UI shows proper branding, theme toggle, company switcher with 'Tüm Firmalar' option, and Settings page with Profile/Users/SMTP tabs all functional.

minor.issue: Returns 500 when SMTP credentials are invalid (expected behavior with fake credentials)

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - charts render but show warning in console

passed_tests: FinTres Pro branding on login page
POST /api/smtp/test endpoint accessible (returns 500 with fake SMTP - expected)
Settings page Users tab renders with user list
Settings page SMTP tab renders with all form fields
Company switcher works with 'Tüm Firmalar' option
Dashboard stats with company filter works
critical_code_review_comments: JWT secret key warning: 'The HMAC key is 23 bytes long, which is below the minimum recommended length of 32 bytes' - consider using a longer JWT_SECRET in production
seed_data_creation: SMTP test settings saved via API test (smtp.test.com, test@test.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: FinTres Pro app fully functional. SMTP settings feature added and working. All tabs in Settings page (Profile, Users, SMTP) render correctly for admin users. Company switcher includes 'Tüm Firmalar' (All Companies) option. Theme toggle works. Turkish localization throughout the app.
